# MoneyMath

> MoneyMath is a suite of 28 free financial, health, and utility calculators. All tools run entirely in your browser with no sign-up, no tracking, and no data stored. Built by Ojas Labs.

## Calculators

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/mortgage): Calculate monthly mortgage payments, total interest, and view amortization schedules for any loan amount, rate, and term.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/compound): See how investments grow over time with compound interest and regular contributions.
- [Paycheck Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/paycheck): Estimate take-home pay after federal and state taxes for all 50 US states.
- [Tax Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/tax): Calculate federal and state income tax for any filing status and income level.
- [Auto Loan Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/auto-loan): Estimate monthly car payments, total interest, and compare loan terms.
- [Retirement Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/retirement): Project retirement savings and determine if you're on track for your goals.
- [401(k) Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/401k): Estimate 401(k) growth with employer matching and contribution limits.
- [Salary Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/salary): Convert between hourly, weekly, biweekly, monthly, and annual pay.
- [Student Loan Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/student-loan): Calculate student loan payments and total repayment cost across different plans.
- [House Affordability Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/house-affordability): Determine how much house you can afford based on income, debts, and down payment.
- [Tip Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/tip): Calculate tip amounts and split bills between multiple people.
- [BMI Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/bmi): Calculate Body Mass Index and see where you fall on the BMI scale.
- [Calorie Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/calorie): Estimate daily calorie needs based on age, weight, height, and activity level.
- [TDEE Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/tdee): Calculate Total Daily Energy Expenditure for weight management.
- [Macro Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/macro): Get personalized macronutrient targets for your fitness goals.
- [Unit Converter](https://moneymath.pro/unit-converter): Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, volume, and more.
- [Date Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/date): Calculate days between dates, add or subtract days from a date.
- [GPA Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/gpa): Calculate cumulative GPA from course grades and credit hours.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/percentage): Calculate percentages, percentage change, and percentage of a number.
- [Inflation Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/inflation): See how purchasing power changes over time due to inflation.
- [Net Worth Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/net-worth): Track assets and liabilities to calculate your total net worth.
- [Debt Payoff Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/debt-payoff): Compare debt snowball vs avalanche strategies and see payoff timelines.
- [Emergency Fund Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/emergency-fund): Determine how much you need in an emergency fund based on your expenses.
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/rent-vs-buy): Compare the long-term financial impact of renting versus buying a home.
- [Investment Return Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/investment-return): Calculate ROI and annualized returns on investments.
- [Savings Goal Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/savings-goal): Figure out how much to save monthly to reach a financial goal.
- [Loan Comparison Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/loan-comparison): Compare multiple loan offers side by side.
- [Amortization Calculator](https://moneymath.pro/amortization): Generate detailed amortization schedules for any loan.

## About

MoneyMath helps people understand their finances without jargon or sign-ups. Every calculation runs client-side in your browser — nothing is sent to a server.

## Built By

[Ojas Labs](https://ojaslabs.dev) — an indie software studio.
